Transmission of Budget Estimates, , , provided that:Pub. L. 102–588, title II, § 210106 Stat. 5115Nov. 4, 1992“The Administrator [of the National Aeronautics and Space Administration] shall, at the time of submission of the President’s annual budget, transmit to the Congress—“(1)a five-year budget detailing the estimated development costs for each individual program under the jurisdiction of the National Aeronautics and Space Administration for which development costs are expected to exceed $200,000,000; and“(2)an estimate of the life-cycle costs associated with each such program.”Similar provisions were contained in the following prior appropriation authorization act:, , .Pub. children.label: A
children.text: the budget for space operations, including the International Space Station and the space shuttle;

children.label: B
children.text: the budget for exploration systems;

children.label: C
children.text: the budget for aeronautics;

children.label: D
children.text: the budget for space science;

children.label: E
children.text: the budget for Earth science;

children.label: F
children.text: the budget for microgravity science;

children.label: G
children.text: the budget for education;

children.label: H
children.text: the budget for safety oversight; and

children.label: I
children.text: the budget for public relations;
the budget for technology transfer programs;
the budget for the Integrated Enterprise Management Program, by individual element;
the budget for the Independent Technical Authority, both total and by center;
the total budget for the prize program under , and the administrative budget for that program; andsection 20144 of this title
the comparable figures for at least the 2 previous fiscal years for each item in the proposed budget.

children.heading: .—Additional Budget Information Upon Request by Committees
children.label: b .—Additional Budget Information Upon Request by Committees
A
children.text: the total amount of funds being allocated for those purposes for any fiscal year for which the President has submitted an annual budget request to Congress;

children.label: B
children.text: the amount of funds being allocated for those purposes for each center, for headquarters, and for each directorate; and

children.label: C
children.text: the major activities included in each cost category; and

children.label: A
children.text: that remained at the end of the fiscal year prior to the fiscal year in which the budget is being presented that were carried over into the fiscal year in which the budget is being presented;

children.label: B
children.text: that are estimated will remain at the end of the fiscal year in which the budget is being presented that are proposed to be carried over into the fiscal year for which the budget is being presented; and

children.label: C
children.text: that are estimated will remain at the end of the fiscal year for which the budget is being presented.
The actual, current, proposed funding level, and estimated budgets for the next 5 fiscal years by directorate, theme, program, project and activity within each appropriations account.
The proposed programmatic and non-programmatic construction of facilities.

children.label: A
children.text: the budget by office, and any division thereof, for the actual, current, proposed funding level, and estimated budgets for the next 5 fiscal years;

children.label: B
children.text: the travel budget for each office, and any division thereof, for the actual, current, and proposed funding level; and

children.label: C
children.text: the civil service full time equivalent assignments per headquarters office, and any division thereof, including the number of Senior Executive Service, noncareer, detailee, and contract personnel per office.

children.label: A
children.text: The actual, current, proposed funding level, and estimated budgets for the next 5 fiscal years by directorate, theme, program, project, and activity.

children.label: B
children.text: The proposed programmatic and non-programmatic construction of facilities.

children.label: C
children.text: The number of civil service full time equivalent positions per center for each identified fiscal year.

children.label: D
children.text: The number of civil service full time equivalent positions considered to be uncovered capacity at each location for each identified fiscal year.
The proposed budget as designated by object class for each directorate, theme, and program.

Sufficient narrative shall be provided to explain the request for each program, project, and activity, and an explanation for any deviation to previously adopted baselines for all justification materials provided to the Committees.

children.heading: .—Estimate of Gross Receipts and Proposed Use of Funds Related to Lease of Property
children.label: d .—Estimate of Gross Receipts and Proposed Use of Funds Related to Lease of Property
children.text: Each annual budget request shall include an annual estimate of gross receipts and collections and proposed use of all funds collected pursuant to .section 20145 of this title
